subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Dominating, the Self-Subsisting, that the attraction of Our mention may seize him and draw him nigh unto the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیاخذه جذب ذکری و یقربه الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
